title: Equality / Identity of Quantity
summary: Equality allows two quantities, symbols, or descriptions to be treated as the same within a defined context.
claim: If A = B, then A and B may be substituted for one another in valid contexts without changing truth.

proof_layers.summary: Equality allows two quantities, symbols, or descriptions to be treated as the same within a defined context.
proof_layers.validation_assessment: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof. Axiomatic or definitional in formal systems.
